nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: Southwestern Arabian foothills savanna
nodes.summary: Southwestern Arabian foothills savanna是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Arabian sunbird、Yemen linnet，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Arabian sunbird
nodes.summary: The Arabian sunbird (Cinnyris hellmayri) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. Subspecies Cinnyris hellmayri hellmayri Neumann Cinnyris hellmayri kinneari Bates Distribution It is native to the Southwestern Arabian foothills savanna. Habitat This species prefers rocky or sandy areas and dry river beds with Acacia and Ziziphus trees. References
